message:
WASM splitter integration: hover tracking and JS serialization

runner_core.rs: Add hover_pointer tracking to RunnerCore. New
pane_splitter_primitives() delegates to collect_splitter_primitives().
record_pane_dispatch() and error paths call
update_hover_pointer_from_log() to track pointer state from lifecycle
events — clears hover on Cancel/Leave/Blur/Hidden/LostCapture, sets
it on Down/Move/Up within viewport. Tests for Idle defaults,
hover/active state on resize, and hover clearing after pointer-up
outside viewport.

wasm.rs: Add pane_splitter_state_label() and pane_splitters_to_js()
for serializing splitter primitives to JS objects. pane_dispatch_to_js()
and pane_state_to_js() now include splitters field. New
paneSplitterPrimitives() wasm-bindgen method on ShowcaseRunner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
